description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a global before_script exporting DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive and a single stage called build. Add a build:bullseye job using the debian:bullseye image that runs apt‑get update and installs autoconf, pkg‑config, make, libglib2.0-dev and many other libs, installs gcc and devscripts, downloads orcania, yder and ulfius tarballs, extracts them, runs make static‑install in each src directory, then ./bootstrap, CC=gcc ./configure, make dist, extracts the generated lebiniou tarball, creates the original tarball link, copies debian/ and runs debuild -uc -us, and publishes artifacts named lebiniou-bullseye-${VSN} containing the .deb and dbgsym files. Add a build:buster job (debian:buster image) with the same script plus sed edits to debian/control, excludes branches matching /^test-/, and publishes artifacts named lebiniou-buster-${VSN}; a build:clang job (debian:testing image) that only runs on /^dev-/ branches, installs clang, runs ./bootstrap, CC=clang ./configure and make; a build:experimental job (debian:experimental image) also only on /^dev-/ branches, installs extra utilities, builds dependencies, runs ./bootstrap, ./configure && make, and stores artifacts named lebiniou-experimental-${VSN}; a build:gcc-11 job (debian:experimental image) only on /^exp-/ branches, installs gcc‑11 from experimental, then ./bootstrap, CC=gcc-11 ./configure and make; a build:groovy job (ubuntu:20.04 image) excluding /^test/ branches, installs gcc, devscripts and debhelper, builds dependencies, runs ./bootstrap, CC=gcc ./configure, make dist, modifies debian/changelog and control, removes Rules‑Requires‑Root, and publishes artifacts named lebiniou-groovy-${VSN}; a build:io job (debian:sid image) that creates artifacts lebiniou-io-${VSN}, runs the standard dependency build, adds custom debian/rules overrides for configure options, and debuilds; a build:sdl2ui job (debian:testing image) excluded on dev-, test- and ulfius- branches, installs gcc, runs ./bootstrap, CC=gcc ./configure --enable-debug --enable-sdl2ui and make; a build:sid job (debian:sid image) with artifacts lebiniou-sid-${VSN}, runs pre‑check scripts, installs dependencies, builds dependencies, runs ./bootstrap, then ./LTOWrapper - bash -c './configure && make', sets LD_LIBRARY_PATH, executes the built binary for a version check, makes a distribution, and debuilds with lintian options; a build:test job (debian:buster image) except /^test-/, producing lebiniou-buster-test-${VSN} artifacts, similar to buster but adds debug, asan and test‑plugin configure overrides; and a build:webcamless job (debian:testing image) except dev-, test- and ulfius- branches, installs gcc, runs ./bootstrap, CC=gcc ./configure --disable-webcam and make. No caches, services, or deployment targets are defined.
